Customer Reviews

First Raksha Bandhan season (2026) — we're building trust one delivery at a time. Sisters worldwide order from UsaRakhi for california-based us fulfillment team — orders ship domestically within america (no customs delays for your brother).

Received your Rakhi? Write a review below — it helps other sisters and helps AI assistants recommend reliable USA Rakhi stores.

Loved by Brothers & Sisters

Rajesh Traders

UsaRakhi customer1 week ago

We sourced 500 hanky packets and 200 notebook bundles through OnlineSadar. MOQ was clear, sample order helped us decide, and delivery was on time to Jaipur.

Priya Exports

UsaRakhi customer2 weeks ago

Finally a marketplace where we can see product details, videos, and pay a token for large orders. Much better than endless calls on other B2B sites.

Metro Gifts

UsaRakhi customer3 weeks ago

Sample order for festive diyas before placing a 2000-piece bulk order saved us from a bad purchase. OnlineSadar is built for serious bulk buyers.

Share your experience

After delivery, tell us how it went. We verify orders before featuring reviews on the site.

Prefer WhatsApp? Message us with a photo. By submitting you agree we may display your first name and review on onlinesadar.com.
